programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: A Saxon forester's son loses everything; a legend is born in blood; the fight for England's soul begins.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Take Cover
programme.desc: Trapped inside a penthouse with little to no cover, a professional sniper must battle an army of thugs to make it out alive.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: Jess is a woman on the run, desperate to cross the Canadian border to escape her past. On her tail is Elsa, a resourceful agent whose recent life-altering diagnosis leaves her one step behind. As their chase narrows to the mountains of the Pacific Northwest, holes in Elsa's investigation begin to fill with fresh bodies.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: A Saxon forester's son loses everything; a legend is born in blood; the fight for England's soul begins.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Take Cover
programme.desc: Trapped inside a penthouse with little to no cover, a professional sniper must battle an army of thugs to make it out alive.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: Jess is a woman on the run, desperate to cross the Canadian border to escape her past. On her tail is Elsa, a resourceful agent whose recent life-altering diagnosis leaves her one step behind. As their chase narrows to the mountains of the Pacific Northwest, holes in Elsa's investigation begin to fill with fresh bodies.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: A Saxon forester's son loses everything; a legend is born in blood; the fight for England's soul begins.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A 40-year-old disappears on the second night of a cruise, her family is left searching for answers, and it ends up changing the way missing persons are reported at sea.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A sous chef aboard a cruise ship leaves her shift unexpectedly and is never seen again; the pressure of the kitchen may have pushed her to take her own life, or maybe there was foul play; the clues could help solve the mystery.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Sydney Loofe's vibrant life takes a tragic turn in November 2017 when she enters the world of online dating and unknowingly crosses paths with Bailey Boswell and Aubrey Trail; as their second date approaches, the couple hatches a sinister plan.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Denita Smith, a 25-year-old graduate student in North Carolina, is murdered on January 4, 2007; before her tragic death, Shannon Crawley, who had a complicated history with Denita's fiance, Jermeir Stroud, became extremely jealous.

programme.title: American Underdog
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Just when his dreams seem all but out of reach, it's only with the support of his wife, Brenda, and the encouragement of his family, coaches and teammates that Warner perseveres and finds the strength to show the world the champion that he already is.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Thing She Said
programme.desc: A young woman befriends an elderly cleaning lady who works in her corporate office. However, their relationship soon turns uneasy, then dangerous, when she rejects a date request from the woman's awkward, middle-aged son.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A 40-year-old disappears on the second night of a cruise, her family is left searching for answers, and it ends up changing the way missing persons are reported at sea.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A sous chef aboard a cruise ship leaves her shift unexpectedly and is never seen again; the pressure of the kitchen may have pushed her to take her own life, or maybe there was foul play; the clues could help solve the mystery.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Sydney Loofe's vibrant life takes a tragic turn in November 2017 when she enters the world of online dating and unknowingly crosses paths with Bailey Boswell and Aubrey Trail; as their second date approaches, the couple hatches a sinister plan.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Denita Smith, a 25-year-old graduate student in North Carolina, is murdered on January 4, 2007; before her tragic death, Shannon Crawley, who had a complicated history with Denita's fiance, Jermeir Stroud, became extremely jealous.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Gabby Petito's disappearance captivated the nation. Her social media posts left a trail, but what they uncovered was more troubling than anyone expected.

programme.title: American Underdog
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Just when his dreams seem all but out of reach, it's only with the support of his wife, Brenda, and the encouragement of his family, coaches and teammates that Warner perseveres and finds the strength to show the world the champion that he already is.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Thing She Said
programme.desc: A young woman befriends an elderly cleaning lady who works in her corporate office. However, their relationship soon turns uneasy, then dangerous, when she rejects a date request from the woman's awkward, middle-aged son.

programme.title: The Boy That Never Was
programme.desc: Robin's behaviour grows more mysterious when she begins to search a woman called Eva Doyle online.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Fog of War
programme.desc: At the height of WWII, a couple stranded on a remote estate become aware of a Nazi spy hiding among them. Unsure who to trust, they must uncover the spy's identity as the outcome of the war hangs precariously in the balance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Boy That Never Was
programme.desc: Robin's behaviour grows more mysterious when she begins to search a woman called Eva Doyle online.

rating.system: Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.desc: At the height of WWII, a couple stranded on a remote estate become aware of a Nazi spy hiding among them. Unsure who to trust, they must uncover the spy's identity as the outcome of the war hangs precariously in the balance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Last Thing She Said
programme.desc: A young woman befriends an elderly cleaning lady who works in her corporate office. However, their relationship soon turns uneasy, then dangerous, when she rejects a date request from the woman's awkward, middle-aged son.

programme.title: American Underdog
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Just when his dreams seem all but out of reach, it's only with the support of his wife, Brenda, and the encouragement of his family, coaches and teammates that Warner perseveres and finds the strength to show the world the champion that he already is.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Gabby Petito's disappearance captivated the nation. Her social media posts left a trail, but what they uncovered was more troubling than anyone expected.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Professional soldier Skylar Nemetz claims he has a momentary lapse in gun safety that lead to his wife Danielle's tragic death; authorities aren't buying that someone with his level of training could accidentally forget to do some basic gun care.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Police finds a new mother murdered soon after reported missing; they bring her partner and his best friend in to be interrogated about her final night; not every interrogation method works with every suspect, and not every theory proves true.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fancher's bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch; the hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state; as the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In the small community of Gormania, W.Va., Cathy Ford receives a mysterious phone call and is reported missing that same evening; a burnt car, blood-soaked trailer and a secret affair all point to the idea that Cathy did not disappear willingly.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Rachel Siani's life ended in tragedy, with clues pointing to a dark obsession. The investigation unearths secrets of her double life and the dangers within it.

programme.title: The Wandering Barber
programme.desc: Jeremy Regan believes places like his barber shop are public spaces of hallowed ground, to potentially understand the world better and even solve some of its biggest issues. As the barber/owner of Hunter and Gunn Barbershop in Winnipeg perhaps he is a bit biased. But to prove his theory, Jeremy hits the road, making his way to Ukraine in the midst of war to learn what local barbers are doing every day during the invasion to support those fending off the invaders. Along the way he uncovers the story of himself and the Ukrainian spirit.

programme.title: The Integrity of Joseph Chambers
programme.desc: Fearing the apocalypse, an insurance salesman embarks on a solo hunting experiment, only to face a traumatic incident.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Professional soldier Skylar Nemetz claims he has a momentary lapse in gun safety that lead to his wife Danielle's tragic death; authorities aren't buying that someone with his level of training could accidentally forget to do some basic gun care.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Police finds a new mother murdered soon after reported missing; they bring her partner and his best friend in to be interrogated about her final night; not every interrogation method works with every suspect, and not every theory proves true.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fancher's bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch; the hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state; as the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In the small community of Gormania, W.Va., Cathy Ford receives a mysterious phone call and is reported missing that same evening; a burnt car, blood-soaked trailer and a secret affair all point to the idea that Cathy did not disappear willingly.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Rachel Siani's life ended in tragedy, with clues pointing to a dark obsession. The investigation unearths secrets of her double life and the dangers within it.

programme.title: Little Girl in the Woods
programme.desc: While backpacking in the deep woods, members of a women's bereavement support group must band together to save a teenage girl who's being held captive in a cabin.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Integrity of Joseph Chambers
programme.desc: Fearing the apocalypse, an insurance salesman embarks on a solo hunting experiment, only to face a traumatic incident.

programme.title: Don't Open the Door
programme.desc: A man dressed as Santa guns down an L.A. family on Christmas Eve and burns their house to the ground; when a coroner's report connects the massacre to a bizarre crime scene across town, the scope of killer's plan is revealed.

programme.title: Barons
programme.desc: Dani discovers a new world with Tash, but risks it for a once-in-a-lifetime surf break; Buddy and Shirley get caught up in Mac's dangerous dealings in Bali; a tragedy changes Buddy's life forever.

programme.title: Troppo
programme.desc: Amanda Pharrell, an eccentric private investigator with a disturbing criminal past, recruits disgraced ex-cop Ted Conkaffey to help solve the disappearance of a Korean tech pioneer.

programme.title: Don't Open the Door
programme.desc: A man dressed as Santa guns down an L.A. family on Christmas Eve and burns their house to the ground; when a coroner's report connects the massacre to a bizarre crime scene across town, the scope of killer's plan is revealed.
